era: Experimental Hip-Hop. E=6 -- Afrofuturist transcendence, Butler arc climax, third consecutive E=6 (155-157). Shabazz Palaces (Ishmael Butler + Tendai Maraire) returns 54 degrees after degree 103. The hip-hop era climax. Sub Pop's most experimental hip-hop signing. Butler arc spans 13 degrees (144 Digable Planets to 157 Shabazz Palaces return).

location.formative: Central District -- historically Black neighborhood, heart of Seattle's Black cultural life. Gentrification pressure. Afrofuturist rootedness in specific place.
location.career: Shabazz Palaces. Ishmael Butler (Palaceer Lazaro) + Tendai Maraire (Baba Maraire). Experimental hip-hop. Sub Pop Records. 2009-present.

members.name: Ishmael Butler (Palaceer Lazaro / Butterfly)
members.note: Formerly Butterfly of Digable Planets (degree 144). Jazz-rap to Afrofuturism. The most radical single-artist transformation in the engine. Central District.

members.name: Tendai Maraire (Baba Maraire)
members.note: Son of Dumisani Maraire (Zimbabwean musician, UW ethnomusicologist). Mbira, marimba, hand drums, electronic percussion. Bridge between African tradition and electronic experimentation.

associated_musicians.name: Digable Planets
associated_musicians.note: Jazz-rap trio. Brooklyn. 1993. Butler as Butterfly. The arc begins.

associated_musicians.name: Dumisani Maraire
associated_musicians.note: Zimbabwean musician and UW ethnomusicologist. Introduced mbira/marimba to PNW. Direct lineage.

associated_musicians.name: Blue Scholars
associated_musicians.note: Back-to-back-to-back E=6. Blue Scholars return (156) + Shabazz Palaces return (157).

associated_musicians.name: The Physics
associated_musicians.note: E=6 three-peat begins at 155. The Physics > Blue Scholars > Shabazz Palaces.

theory_nodes.concept: E=6 three-peat -- three consecutive maximum-energy entries (155-157): The Physics, Blue Scholars return, Shabazz Palaces return. Unprecedented sustained peak. Hip-hop era climax.
examples: 155: The Physics (E=6). Explosive live energy. Plateau break.
157: Shabazz Palaces return (E=6). Afrofuturist climax. Butler arc.
Unprecedented: no previous three-consecutive-E=6 in the engine.
theory_nodes.description: Three consecutive E=6. Unprecedented. Hip-hop era climax.

genealogy.relationship: Shabazz Palaces return at 157 completes the three-peat.

theory_nodes.concept: Butler arc (144-157) -- Ishmael Butler's artistic journey from Digable Planets (jazz-rap, Brooklyn, 1993) to Shabazz Palaces (Afrofuturism, Seattle, 2010s-2020s). 13-degree span. Butterfly to Palaceer Lazaro. Most radical single-artist transformation.
examples: 144: Digable Planets. Butler as Butterfly. Jazz-rap. Brooklyn.
103: Shabazz Palaces debut. Butler as Palaceer Lazaro. Black Up.
157: Shabazz Palaces return. Quazarz, Don of Diamond Dreams, Robed in Rareness.
13-degree span. Jazz-rap to Afrofuturism. The transformation.
theory_nodes.description: Butler arc. 13 degrees. Jazz-rap to Afrofuturism.

genealogy.relationship: Shabazz Palaces return at 157. Arc complete.

theory_nodes.concept: Afrofuturist aesthetic -- the intersection of African diaspora culture, technology, science fiction, and speculative futures. Central District roots + cosmic ambition. Maraire's Zimbabwean heritage + Butler's hip-hop evolution. Genre dissolution. The most conceptually ambitious project in Seattle music.
examples: Quazarz double album: alien perspective on Earth. Afrofuturist narrative.
The Don of Diamond Dreams: digital identity, simulation, authenticity.
Maraire: mbira, marimba, Zimbabwean tradition meets electronic production.
Central District: cosmic speculation grounded in neighborhood specificity.
theory_nodes.description: Afrofuturism. Genre dissolution. Central District + cosmos.

genealogy.relationship: Shabazz Palaces as Seattle's Afrofuturist culmination.

cross_references.relationship: THE DEBUT! 54 degrees ago. Black Up. Sub Pop. Experimental hip-hop from the Central District. The announcement of the Afrofuturist vision.
BUTLER ARC ORIGIN! Ishmael Butler as Butterfly. Jazz-rap. Brooklyn. 1993. 13 degrees to the return at 157.
BACK-TO-BACK E=6! Blue Scholars return (156) + Shabazz Palaces return (157). Reunion to Afrofuturism. Second and third of three consecutive E=6.
E=6 THREE-PEAT! The Physics (155) starts the three consecutive E=6 run. Explosive live energy begins the sustained peak.
